title: Find My Device - Connected / Nearby device details
scenario: "Find My Device" feature in App Settings correctly displays connected device name, connection status, instruction text, and Play button
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap on the menu icon (three dots or hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
Select 'Find My Device' from the App Settings menu.
Observe the displayed information on the Find My Device screen.
expected: The Find My Device screen displays the connected/nearby device details including: device name, connection status (Connected), a description instructing the user to ensure the device is the main audio source to play a tone, and a Play button.
